name: GRIMOIR by Müsslin
author: Müsslin (audiomyweb)
description: Ableton Live 12 Extensions SDK tool that generates complete MIDI ideas across four layers (Bass, Chords, Arp, Lead), with three write modes: FULL, CHORD, and BASS. Released at v1.0.0 as a development build.
notes: The author marks this as a development/experimental build.
